feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Uploaded .PDF file by DTW in OCRD Table in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to upload the all Vendors MSME Certificate file as a attachment by DTW. Can anyone suggest, how it will work?

entry.title: PDF file uploading by DTW in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear All,

I tried the DTW OCRD Template. And add the following data : 

CardCodeCardNameAttachmentEntry
CardCodeCardNameAtcEntry
VP-10056Labmech Engineers\\172.16.3.13\SBO_Mail\Attachment

But after uploading the file, DTW giving error " 1 Update Failed VP-10056 CServiceData::SetPropertyValue failed; Value must be a whole number in property 'AttachmentEntry' of 'BusinessPartner'oBusinessPartners "

can anyone suggest the solution?

entry.title: How do I trigger a User Defined Object in PostTransactionNotice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a UDO and linked UDT's to it. The example below shows and extract of the lines table:

I have created the following script in PostTransactionNotice to update an external table with changes to the status. Running the query on it's own works perfectly, but it does not trigger in PostTransactionNotice.
Do I need to change something for the PostTransactionNotice to read the Objecttype?
IF @object_TYPE = 'MRMSCC' and @transaction_type = 'U'
BEGIN
Update [MRM_CC].[dbo].[ServiceCallInformation]
set ItemStatus = UF.U_ScStatus
From
(select Code,LineID,U_ScStatus from [SAP_CCR].[dbo].[@_MRMCSCLN]
where U_ScStatus = 'Closed') UF
where Id = UF.LineId
and UF.Code = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
END

entry.title: Freight used into Delivery or AR Invoice SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have used freight into delivery note but the journal entry is not working for freight which was used into delivery note. 

The impact can work into AR Invoice only and apply only for Drawing method only.  If I have selected None option into Drawing method then freight is not working.  

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: error in the data archiving
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When trying to run the Data Archiving Wizard Utility, I get the following error messages after running for almost 10 hours:

Error while analysing data; data archiving cannot proceed

Do any of you have any experiences how to solve this problem ?

I have checked this link because the error message is the same:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/data-archiving-error/qaq-p/7867212

but not solved. I have attached the log file for you to review

Thanks

entry.title: Project Management work order in stages not showing in project overview window
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Please refer below snapshot we have assigned work order no 25 in stage 2 but it was not reflecting in project overview report.

Project overview report by right click 

Please let us know why its not showing and wht is missing in our side.

Regards,

Naresh M

+91 8838341723

nareshkumar@group-ea.com

entry.title: Including Purchase Request in Search Customization
entry.content:
Dears, 

      In the "Search Customization" in SAP Business One HANA, is there a possibility to add the "Purchase Request" along with the rest of the documents under the "AP Transaction" as per the attached screenshot. 

- If yes so please provide the steps.

entry.title: multi-currency pasting -invalid currency
entry.content:
I created a JE, fill in a foreign currency in Debit (FC) ,  a prompt " invalid currency" appeared. 

I checked : currency settings / Enable Multi-Currency transactions / exchange rate setup, they are work.

What is problem? Please advise. (This function was working fine before)

entry.title: Before AP Invoice Created Inventory out from SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have created one GRPO with 10 quantity for single item and before that GRPO AP Invoice process done, a few inventory or full inventory quantity out from SAP then what is the impact is created into SAP for Stock G/L?

SAP Business One, SAP B1, Stock G/L

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Calculated member in cross tab report
entry.content:
Hello,

I need help with performing calculations using crosstabs in Crystal Reports.

 
This Gross Margin at the bottom  is the calculated member
this is the formula that is used to  budget
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Sales"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)-
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Cost of Raw Materials"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)
this is the formula that is used to calculate total Actual 
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Sales"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)-
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Cost of Raw Materials"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)
this is the formula that is used to calculate total Variance
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Sales"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)-
GridValueAt(GetIndexOf("Command.U_Sub","Cost of Raw Materials"), CurrentColumnIndex, CurrentSummaryIndex)
 
Now I want to calculate the total variance% by dividing the total variance by the total budget value.
(259,160.47)/455,926.85=(0.57).How can I do this?

entry.title: Purpose use of Offset account SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

What is the purpose of Offset account to use into SAP B1? 

For example, Offset account which was used in Issue for production which was clear during Receipt from Production?

Offset account use, SAP Business One, SAP B1

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: SAP B1 Web Client Not Accessing On Mobile Browser
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a problem that is i can not access my SAP B1 web client on mobile phone browser but i can easily access it on my laptop browser. My laptop and my mobile phone are on same network. 

What's the reason behind this issue. Need assistance.

Thanks,
Faraz Maqsud.

entry.title: Duplicate Email address of S-User id Error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

In S-user ID, we are getting the below error of duplicate email ID, but this ID is not used for any other S user.

Please let me know what could be the reason.

 

Regards,

Krishna Varma

entry.title: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029) when adding Incoming Payment against Service Invoice
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm using SAP B1 10.0 FP 2111.

I have a problem in adding the incoming payments based on a service invoice. The payment means selected is Bank Transfer. Please note that there is Export Customer & payment is in Foreign Currency. This happens not only while taking Payment entry based in Service Invoice but also when doing Manual Reconciliation of Service Invoice & On Account Incoming Payment. All details has been added properly, but the system show the error message while adding Incoming Payment as below: 'Field cannot be updated (ODBC-1029)' <<Message 131-183>>

Please recommend a solution and also suggest reasons for occuring such query again & again for Service AR Invoice.

Thanks in advance!!!
.

entry.title: TROUBLE WITH ATP IN SALES ORDER (SAP B1/HANA)
entry.content:
Dear all

I'm facing a trouble with ATP calculation in a sales order.

I'm creating a sales order for quantity 10 on item A. This item have only 5 in stock. So, the Message coming from the delivery schedule details display that only 5 pieces can be taken (ok at this step)

The delivery schedule management show that 5 are committed and 5 are unconfirmed (still ok).

But, in the column of the sales order, the committed value is 10 and not 5. The procurement wizard start automatically (option on logistics tab) but the choice "include only unconfirmed quantities" is not displaying a purchase for 5. It brings 0.

I tried several changes on ATP rule and items but it's always the same trouble.

I don't find where I did a mistake on settings ?

Thanks for your help

Pascal

(Tests are done on SAP B1 10.00.240 SP2402)

entry.title: Knowledge Exchange B1 Production Module
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we have been using SAP B1 for over a decade now but we only started using the Production module very recently and despite very valuable help by our SAP consultants, we are not super happy with the B1 production processes as they seem quite cumbersome.

Before investing time and money into possibly unnecessary add-ons, I thought it might be extremely valuable to see the Production module in action at another company which has gained more experience with it. Of course, this would not have to be a one-sided exchange as we are more than happy to share our knowledge regarding all other B1 modules.

Not 100% sure if this is the right place to ask this but: Is there anyone out there who is content with his/her B1 production processes and would be willing to share his/her practical experience with us?

Thanks for all responses!

entry.title: 3011 - No permission to cancel, Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We cannot cancel incoming payment even though user have Limited Financed assigned. And user is Super User in User Level.

Why user cannot cancel incoming payment and system show error message like 

(3011)- You have no permission to cancel, Journal Entry.

We are looking forward the best solutions from your Domain Knowledge and Experiences.

Thanks.

entry.title: Outgoing Payment - Discount field
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Does anyone know why when I open a self-Payment the discount field is not visible?
But when I open it from the A/P invoice, it is visible.
Why this behavior?
Is it controllable?

Details:
SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.140) FP 2011 (64-bit)
Localization - Germany

entry.title: Disassembly production order create again actual production order SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding and any kind of linking between actual production order and it's Disassembly production order ? 

How we can get information like this is our actual original production order and against this we have created this Disassembly production order.

Disassembly production order, SAP Business One, Production Order

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: SAP Business One API Gateway | Report orientation
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm faced with the following problem: when I receive a report via the Gateway API in base64 format, the file comes in vertical orientation (portrait), while I need landscape format, which is set in the Page Setup in the report. Is there any way to fix this?

I would be grateful for any advice!
